log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!

→ Rock: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Triton — Iron Concentration HP: 42/67
